title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official CLI and server for running large language models locally (Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, etc.) with a simple pull-run workflow.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for the Ollama server; works in Node and browsers via fetch.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client library with sync/async chat, embed, pull, and ps commands.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package exposing Ollama models as LLM, chat, and embeddings components.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (chat UI, model management, multi-user, dark mode).

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama with fluent builder API and reactive streams.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Community-maintained Ruby gem wrapping the Ollama REST API.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Lightweight Go CLI for pulling, listing, and deleting Ollama models.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension bringing local Ollama models into GitHub Copilot chat pane.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration to use Ollama models as generators or embedders in RAG pipelines.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET 8 client library with async enumerable streaming and dependency injection helpers.

title: ollama-docker
summary: Official Docker images (CPU & GPU) for running Ollama server containerized.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Community Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU node selection.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Streamlit app demonstrating retrieval-augmented generation using Ollama embeddings and ChromaDB.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Discord bot that queries local Ollama models via slash commands and threads.

title: ollama-npm
summary: npm package providing the official JS client for Ollama (same repo as ollama-js).

title: ollama-pypi
summary: PyPI package for the official Python client (mirror of ollama-python repo).
